title: fix: notify issues on pre-PR solve failures
fix(solve): restore tool-comment posting broken by v1.53.1 stdin regression
fix: improve PR creation failure error messaging and log upload fallback (Issue #1462)
On CTRL+C: auto-commit uncommitted changes and upload log if --attach-logs
fix: narrow "Ready to merge" duplicate check to current session scope (#1584)
Fix missing log upload on tool failure and make 529 overload retryable (Issue #1439)
fix: make all long sleeps interruptible so CTRL+C responds immediately (#1574)
Preserve PR issue links after Codex auto-restart
fix: non-consistent auto-restart logic on comments
fix: enable large log file uploads using gh-upload-log (issue #1173)
